steps.title: Identify the intercept
steps.content: The function $f(x)=7x+6$ is in the form $mx+b$. The constant $6$ is the value when $x=0$.

steps.title: Interpret the initial value
steps.content:
Here, $x=0$ means when the tree's height was first measured:
$$f(0)=7(0)+6=6$$
So the tree was estimated to be $6$ feet tall then. The answer is D.
